rubric.note: No gold exists for this clip, so NOTHING here is scored for accuracy: points and hard_line are null on every path. What is real: coverage, withheld, time-to-usable and the entity-gate hits — measurements of what this run DID, not of whether it was right. 5 lines were flagged hard because they carry a ko-v3 phenomenon, which is a detection, not a verdict. Scoring against gold lives in bench/.

cold.label: Cold one-shot
cold.note: whisper-1 + one-shot gpt-4o, no glossary, no gates. It is handed the prepped path's windows for free, so it is a foil for translation, entities and honesty — NOT for segmentation. Coverage is 1.00 because it never withholds. "hallucinated" is entity-gate hits, not gold-verified errors.

run-006.label: Run 4 · this run
run-006.note: 7 of 11 lines committed, 4 withheld by a gate that fired, 0 sent back to the translator and fixed. hard_line is null: this run cannot mark its own homework.
